name_local: Catedral de San Salvador de Oviedo

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office for tower access is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para subir a la torre?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah PAH-rah soo-BEER ah lah toh-RREH?

likely_response.local: En la entrada lateral, junto al museo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah lah-teh-RAHL HOON-toh AHL moo-SEH-oh
likely_response.translation_en: At the side entrance, next to the museum.

responses.english: At the side entrance, next to the museum.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah lah-teh-RAHL HOON-toh AHL moo-SEH-oh
responses.french: En la entrada lateral, junto al museo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get the audio guide
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger la audioguía en español?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-koh-HER lah ow-dee-oh-GWEE-ah en es-pah-NYOHL?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla principal, al entrar.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AHL ehnt-RAHR
likely_response.translation_en: At the main ticket office, upon entering.

responses.english: At the main ticket office, upon entering.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AHL ehnt-RAHR
responses.french: En la taquilla principal, al entrar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Holy Chamber entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿por dónde se entra a la Cámara Santa?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, pohr DOHN-deh seh EHN-trah ah lah KAH-mah-rah SAHN-tah?

likely_response.local: Por el claustro, junto a la puerta norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR EHL klah-OO-stroh HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah NOHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Through the cloister, follow the signs.

responses.english: Through the cloister, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: POHR EHL klah-OO-stroh HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah NOHR-teh
responses.french: Por el claustro, junto a la puerta norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Camino pilgrim office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la oficina del peregrino?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh es-TAH lah oh-fee-SEE-nah del peh-reh-GREE-noh?

likely_response.local: Cerca de la catedral, calle San Francisco.
likely_response.pronunciation: THEHR-kah DEH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL KAHL-leh SAHN frahn-THEE-skoh
likely_response.translation_en: Near the cathedral, San Francisco street.

responses.english: Near the cathedral, San Francisco street.
responses.phonetic: THEHR-kah DEH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL KAHL-leh SAHN frahn-THEE-skoh
responses.french: Cerca de la catedral, calle San Francisco.
